title: critic
description: Critic score and structured feedback consumed by apply_critic.py.

pass.description: Whether the assembly meets the quality bar.

summary.description: One-line summary of the main problems.

component.description: Part name the issue applies to.

locked.description: True only if scale, position, and orientation are all correct; apply_critic.py must not change this component.

problem.description: What is wrong with this component's placement.

corrected_world_size.description: Target world dimensions [W, D, H] in metres. apply_critic.py assigns this directly to link.world_size in assembly.json.

corrected_world_center.description: Target world-space centre [x, y, z] in metres. apply_critic.py assigns this directly to link.world_center in assembly.json.

suggested_rotation_delta.description: Rotation change in degrees [drx, dry, drz] to add to link.rpy_deg in assembly.json.

per_view_notes.description: Free-form notes keyed by render view name.
